product.name: VibePad

reviewQuestions.question: How reliable is gamepad-to-keyboard mapping in daily use?
Does VibePad work with all macOS gamepads and controllers?
Is there noticeable input lag when pressing gamepad buttons?
How stable is the hold-to-talk dictation trigger?
Can I remap every button using the JSON config easily?
How well does right-stick scrolling handle small adjustments?
Does it support multiple mapping profiles or layers?
Can I disable mappings per app or context?
How does clipboard-aware smart paste behave in IDEs?
Does it interfere with existing global shortcuts or macros?
What happens if the gamepad disconnects mid-session?
Are there presets for Claude Code or popular IDEs?
Can I fine-tune dead zones and scroll sensitivity?
How well does dictation handle coding terms and syntax?
Does it require Accessibility permissions, and why?
Is there a quick way to pause or toggle mappings?
How resource intensive is it on CPU and battery?
Does it support analog mouse movement or only scroll?
Is the project actively maintained and updated?
How easy is uninstalling and removing all permissions?

product.tagline: Control AI coding assistants with a gamepad from your couch

launch.name: VibePad
launch.tagline: Control AI coding assistants with a gamepad from your couch
launch.description:
VibePad is a free macOS menu bar app that maps your gamepad to keyboard shortcuts. Built for AI coding tools like Claude Code and Codex where the workflow is mostly Accept, Reject, Scroll, Navigate and Dictate.

X - approve, O - reject,  L2 trigger = hold-to-talk dictation, Right stick = scroll. Config is a JSON file if you want to remap anything.
Native Swift. Open source. No account, no subscription, no catch.
The idea started as a joke - then I built most of VibePad using VibePad itself.

detailedReviews.shoutoutNote: I love ethos and value this product delivers

product.tagline: Anthropic’s deep-context AI coder

reviewQuestions.question: How reliable is the Share → Thinglo flow across apps?
Does AI auto-titling produce accurate, useful titles consistently?

Are saved media thumbnails and metadata fetched correctly?
How responsive is support and how fast are updates?

product.tagline: Save anything from any app — AI-organized, private, instant

launch.name: Thinglo
launch.tagline: Save anything from any app — AI-organized, private, instant
launch.description:
Thinglo is the simplest way to save and organize everything from your phone.

Found something on Instagram, Safari, TikTok, or anywhere? Tap Share → Thinglo. Done.

- 🧠 AI auto-titles and categorizes everything
- 📱 For You feed resurfaces forgotten saves
- 🔍 Instant search + iOS Spotlight
- 📝 Rich notes on any item
- ⏰ AI-powered smart reminders
- 📷 Document scanner with OCR
- 🔒 100% private — Face ID, on-device, no tracking

Free to start. Pro unlocks unlimited saves.

detailedReviews.shoutoutNote: Claude helped me build Thinglo from the ground up — from coding features to writing App Store descriptions. My AI co-pilot throughout the entire journey.

product.tagline: A family of foundational AI models

detailedReviews.shoutoutNote: The IDE that made it all possible. Built Thinglo natively in Swift with SwiftUI, and Xcode's tools made development smooth

product.name: Agile Loop
product.tagline: A foundation large action model designed for AI Agents

makerComment.bodyHtml:
Hey Product Hunt fam! Meet SAM-X by Agile Loop

Who hasn’t relied on spreadsheets to keep things organized, only to have one small mistake throw everything off? A wrong formula, a broken filter, or a formatting slip can quietly create a much bigger impact than expected.

We built SAM-X to take that fragility out of spreadsheet work. Instead of writing formulas or setting things up manually, you just describe what you want to do in plain English, and SAM-X handles the rest.

It can clean and restructure messy data, apply complex filters, run lookups and calculations, generate pivot tables, build charts, and even create full dashboards from raw data. Multi-step tasks that usually take dozens of clicks can be done in a single instruction.

We’re launching today and really excited to finally share this with the community. We’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts and reactions.

Happy to answer any questions here!

Numair

It can clean and restructure messy data, apply complex filters, run lookups and calculations, generate pivot tables, build charts, and even create full dashboards from raw data. Multi-step tasks that usually take dozens of clicks can be done in a single instruction.

We’re launching today and really excited to finally share this with the community. We’d genuinely love to hear your thoughts and reactions.

Happy to answer any questions here!

Numair

reviewQuestions.question: How accurately do agents execute complex multi-step desktop tasks?
What success rate do agents achieve without human intervention?
How does it handle changing UI layouts or element names?
Can I constrain agent actions to prevent risky clicks?
What auditing and activity logs are available for executions?
How easily can non-technical users train new task flows?
Does it support on-prem deployment and local desktop agents?
Which third-party apps and browsers are officially supported?
How does it compare to RPA on maintenance overhead?
Can agents combine API calls with UI interactions seamlessly?
How is sensitive data handled during screen parsing?
What role-based access controls and approvals are available?
How are errors detected, retried, and escalated to humans?
What monitoring and alerting exists for long-running workflows?
Can I version and roll back agent prompts and policies?
How does Excel automation handle large files and macros?
What is the average setup time for a new workflow?
How is custom model or policy training performed and updated?
What licensing, per-seat, or usage-based pricing applies?
What enterprise support and SLA options are offered?

launch.name: SAM-X
launch.description:
SAM-X is an AI copilot that turns your ugliest spreadsheets into executive-ready reports — no formulas required.

Just describe what you want in plain English. From messy data to presentation-ready outputs, SAM-X completes multi-step spreadsheet workflows in a single instruction, at any scale. It handles data cleanup, restructuring, advanced lookups, pivot tables, charts and full dashboards.

Built for people who rely on spreadsheets but don’t want to lose hours fixing small but fatal mistakes.
